name: Cloudflare Deployment Engineer
description: An agent that deploys any Cloudflare Workers app straight from its GitHub repo, using the terminal — gh + wrangler with sandbox-exposed credentials, no bespoke tools.

secrets.name: GITHUB_TOKEN
secrets.description: Personal access token with read access to the organisation's repos — the agent's gh CLI reads it from its shell environment.

secrets.name: GITHUB_ORG
secrets.description: The GitHub organisation the deployable repos live in.

secrets.name: CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN
secrets.description: API token with the 'Edit Cloudflare Workers' permission for the target account — wrangler reads it from the shell environment.

secrets.name: CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID
secrets.description: The Cloudflare account id the apps deploy into.
